targets.query:
from(bucket: "polysource_data")
  |> range(start: 0)  // ou une période large pour inclure toutes les données
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "battery_percent")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["device_id"] == "source01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "telegraf-container")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "polysource_data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "flow_rate_l_min")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["device_id"] == "source01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "telegraf-container")
  |> group(columns: ["_measurement", "device_id", "host"])  // Assure de grouper par ces colonnes

from(bucket: "polysource_data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "water_level_cm")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["device_id"] == "source01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "telegraf-container")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "polysource_data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "water_level_cm")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["device_id"] == "source01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "telegraf-container")
  |> group(columns: ["_measurement", "device_id", "host"])  // Assure de grouper par ces colonnes
